details: Potholes repaired using hot asphalt patch. Damaged water main replaced and footbridge secured with temporary supports. Sinkhole excavation completed and filled with compacted gravel. Loose manhole secured and leveled.

feedback.review: All major road hazards fixed. Excellent response time for the water main issue.
The footbridge feels secure now, though the repair took a while.

details: Traffic light control unit replaced and junction re-calibrated. Tested for 48 hours to ensure synchronization.

feedback.review: Lights are working well again, solved the traffic problem.

details: Manual traffic direction provided during light repair. / Tree branch safely removed from power lines. / Bridge structural inspection conducted. / Pavement repaired.

feedback.review: They fixed multiple small issues in the area at once. Very efficient.

details: Street lamp repaired (LED module and driver replaced). Wide-area inspection conducted to replace multiple burnt-out bulbs. Secured leaning pole and repaired damaged fixture.

feedback.review: The lighting crew was very efficient, the whole road is bright again.
The leaning pole was fixed quickly, removing the immediate danger. Thank you.

details: Permanent railing installed on the footbridge. Damaged wooden bench replaced with a durable composite bench. Repair team deployed to secure the footbridge railing.

feedback.review: The park bench was replaced quickly. The area is much safer now.

details: Storm drain unclogged and cleaned using high-pressure jetting. / Pavement slab repaired and pipes covered. / Sewage manhole disinfected and sealed.

feedback.review: The smell is gone and the flooding has stopped. Excellent work by the drain team.

details: Damaged bus stop furniture replaced. Information board glass replaced. Flowerbed cleaned up and replanted.

feedback.review: Fast replacement, the bus stop looks clean and inviting now.

details: Intervention with minimart management. New delivery schedule enforced (06:00-22:00).

feedback.review: The noise immediately stopped! Thank you for the quick intervention.

details: New signs installed and old signs replaced. Pedestrian crossing sign reinstalled.

feedback.review: The new crosswalk sign is bright and clearly visible now, much safer for the children.

details: Vendor stalls removed and warnings issued. Additional public waste bin installed. Overflowing bins collected and new schedule set.

feedback.review: Vendors cleared out and we can walk freely again! The area is much tidier.

details: Weekly deep cleaning of the market area sidewalks implemented. Loose pavement tiles replaced and cemented securely.

feedback.review: Cleaning is noticeably better. Happy the tripping hazard is fixed for the kids.
Sidewalk is solid now. Good repair.

details: Overgrown tree branches obscuring signs were professionally pruned. Uprooted plants replanted and damaged flower bed repaired.

feedback.review: The signs are finally clear, and the park looks vibrant again.

details: Pedestrian signal cycle optimized. Waiting time during peak hours reduced by 15 seconds.

feedback.review: The wait is noticeably shorter. Small fix, big impact.

details: Professional graffiti removal, anti-graffiti coating applied, and discreet CCTV installed on the building corner.

feedback.review: The district office looks pristine again. Security camera is a good deterrent.

details: Temporary railing erected near the klong bank. Permanent steel railing order placed and installation initiated.

feedback.review: Temporary railing is up, makes it much safer, awaiting the permanent one.

details: Weekly segregated waste collection increased to three times a week in the Thanyaburi area. New large capacity bin installed in the Rangsit area.

feedback.review: The bin issue is solved. No more overflowing trash at the corner.

details: Daily cleaning patrols assigned to the market area after closing hours. Large volume trash bins installed.

feedback.review: The area is clean every morning. Noticeable improvement in cleanliness.

details: Trimming of tree branches to ensure sign visibility. Flower bed repairs completed.

feedback.review: Branches are trimmed, signs are clear. Good work.

details: Traffic light signal cycle adjusted for better flow. Road markings repainted. Foliage trimmed for visibility. Permanent fix for the traffic synchronization issue.

feedback.review: Synchronization is much better, traffic moves faster now. Clear signs.

details: Graffiti removed and anti-graffiti paint applied. Security cameras installed in the park.

feedback.review: Graffiti gone and a camera installed. Excellent response.

details: Installation of permanent steel railing along the klong. Fallen branch removed. Tree roots trimmed and sidewalk stabilized.

feedback.review: The permanent railing is installed and looks great. The path is safe now.
The dangerous overgrowth near the road was finally cleared. Very necessary work.

details: Basketball court resurfacing completed. New backboard and hoop installed. New lines painted.

feedback.review: The court is fantastic, perfect for playing now!
The new backboard is excellent, and the surface is smooth.

details: Chemical spill site thoroughly cleaned and soil removed. Illegally dumped tires and trash collected and disposed of. Weekly collection enforced.

feedback.review: The area is completely clean, and the frequent trash collection schedule is working wonders.
The chemical spill was handled quickly before it could spread further. Highly professional cleanup.

details: Emergency callout to replace the main circuit board in the power box. Burned out bulb in underpass replaced with high-efficiency LED.

feedback.review: The lights are working now, and the underpass feels safe again.

details: Additional security patrols assigned to the unlit area near the residential block. Temporary fence installed around the municipal school.

feedback.review: The patrols made a difference immediately. The school is safe now.

details: Cracked concrete slabs removed and replaced with safe, shock-absorbent rubberized playground surfacing.

feedback.review: Excellent work. The new surface is soft and safe for the children.

details: Installation of high-power LED floodlights at the crosswalk. Street lamp repaired and re-secured. Electrical repairs completed.

feedback.review: The crosswalk is perfectly lit now. Feels much safer walking home.

details: Road resurfacing of the access road initiated and completed. Damaged guardrail replaced. Tactile paving installed. Sidewalk and road erosion repaired. Paving stones re-leveled.

feedback.review: The road is completely smooth now, and the new paving is excellent for pedestrians.
They fixed the erosion problem along the riverbank quickly, which was a huge safety concern.

details: Bulky waste cleared and disposed. Debris from construction site removed. Ornamental weeds removed. Illegal flyers removed. Weekly monitoring established.

feedback.review: The abandoned lot is finally clear! The flyers are gone.

details: Inter-agency speed enforcement program initiated. Vendor trolleys removed, area cleared. Graffiti removal on the monument completed. Security warning issued.

feedback.review: Great to see enforcement in the area. The speeding issue is much better controlled.
The monument was cleaned very quickly. It looks respectable again.

details: Damaged outdoor gym equipment repaired and repainted with rust-proof coating.

feedback.review: Equipment is safe and clean to use again. Thank you.

details: Sewer line unclogged, odor eliminated. Storm drain capacity increased. Missing grate replaced. Blockage materials removed. Permanent solution implemented.

feedback.review: The underpass no longer floods! Odor is gone, fantastic.
The team worked quickly to replace the missing drain cover, preventing a hazard.

details: Sprinkler timer replaced and system calibrated. Fence around the municipal school permanently repaired. Damaged fountain fixed. Football field netting replaced.

feedback.review: The park fountain is working perfectly now, great timing before the hot season. School fence is secure.
Excellent work repairing the damaged fence and fountain.

details: Municipal Law Enforcement dispatched to the area to capture/relocate the stray dogs. Patrols increased to monitor the area.

feedback.review: The strays are gone and the street is quiet again. Appreciate the fast action.

details: Crosswalk markings repainted with highly visible thermoplastic paint. Illegal stall removed. New signs installed. Damaged reflector posts replaced.

feedback.review: The crosswalk is safe and clear now, and the illegal stall is gone.

details: Emergency patch repair of cracked pavement sections. Full road resurfacing project initiated (ongoing).
Tree pruning and aesthetic maintenance completed. Installation of new 'Do Not Litter' signs in the area.

feedback.review: The park looks neat, and the signs are visible. Quick and effective.

details: Damaged playground swings and slide replaced with new, safety-compliant equipment.

feedback.review: The children love the new equipment! Very fast installation.

details: Water pressure fluctuation investigated; minor leak found in the pumping station and repaired.

feedback.review: Pressure restored quickly, good work.

details: Traffic signal sensor adjusted to provide fair priority to the bus lane, reducing waiting times.

feedback.review: Bus traffic is significantly faster now, excellent optimization!

details: Emergency deployment to remove hazardous debris (large metal sheet) from the road surface.

feedback.review: The obstruction was cleared quickly. Thank you for making the road safe.

details: Cleaning crew dispatched to remove graffiti and apply anti-vandalism coating to the retaining wall.

feedback.review: Quick response. The wall is clean and looks new again.

details: Repair team dispatched to replace the faulty circuit breaker in the lighting panel. Burned out street lamp replaced.

feedback.review: Lights are back on! Very fast service.

details: Cleaning crew dispatched to remove accumulated organic debris (leaves, branches) blocking the storm sewer inlets.

feedback.review: Water is draining correctly now. Good job.

details: Contractor notified and dispatched to replace the entire damaged section of the elevated walkway railing.

feedback.review: The railing is replaced. Much safer now.

details: Illegally parked cars ticketed and towed. Ongoing surveillance to prevent vendors from re-establishing. Construction debris removed from the sidewalk.

feedback.review: The street is finally clear for pedestrians and traffic flow is improved.

details: Major repair of damaged storm drain pipe, including excavation and replacement of a 15-meter section. Road patched with temporary asphalt.

feedback.review: The flooding has stopped completely. Roadwork was slow but effective.

details: Deep cleaning and disinfection of public waste collection points. New bins installed with anti-scavenging features. Waste collection frequency increased to daily.

feedback.review: The area is much cleaner, and the rodent issue seems to be gone.

details: Traffic signal timing re-optimized across three major junctions to improve peak hour flow (Green Wave implementation).

feedback.review: Commute time seems slightly faster. Good adjustment.

details: Faulty street lamp control unit replaced and new LED bulbs installed. Electrical cable isolation and repair completed.

feedback.review: The park path is finally lit. Much safer at night. Fast repair.

details: Major road section excavated and repaired due to underlying pipe failure causing soil erosion and collapse. New sub-base laid and road resurfaced with concrete.

feedback.review: The road is completely fixed, feels solid. Worth the wait.

details: Professional exterminator contracted to bait and treat the area for rats. Weekly monitoring implemented for three months.

feedback.review: Rodent activity reduced significantly. Effective response.

details: Noise violation warnings issued to the restaurant. Illegal street vendor relocated and area cleared. Increased security patrols in the nightlife district.

feedback.review: The noise level has dropped dramatically. Thank you for the quick action.

details: Installation of high-visibility road markings at the school crossing. Damaged speed bump replaced. New 'School Zone' warning signs installed.

feedback.review: The school zone is much safer now, excellent and clear markings.

details: Damaged perimeter fence of the football field repaired. Uprooted plants replanted. Park sign restored.

feedback.review: Quick fix, the field is secure and ready for games.

details: Major water main burst repaired. Requires deep excavation, replacement of a large section of main, and extensive road restoration.

feedback.review: Water pressure is fully restored. Thank you for the dedication to fixing this complex issue.

details: Replacement of faulty street lamp ballasts and timers. Installation of a new lighting sensor for automatic switching.

feedback.review: All lights are working, the street is safe and well-lit again.

details: Bulk illegal dumping removed and site fenced off. New garbage collection schedule implemented for residential area. Waste disposal signs posted.

feedback.review: The corner is spotless and the fence helps keep it clean.

details: High-visibility speed enforcement by MLE patrols during peak hours (07:00-09:00 and 16:00-18:00) for one week.

feedback.review: The speeding issue is temporarily controlled due to the presence of patrols.

details: Full pavement restoration on the main road section (500m). Large potholes filled and sidewalk slabs re-cemented and levelled.

feedback.review: The road is smooth and safe to drive on now. Excellent PWI work.
The old, cracked sidewalk is perfectly level. Great job.

details: Removal of all illegal vendor stalls and temporary structures from the public path. Warnings issued to all vendors regarding future violations. Regular enforcement patrols initiated.

feedback.review: Finally, the path is clear! We can walk safely without obstructions.

details: Traffic flow study conducted and bus stop location reviewed. Minor road marking adjustments and bus lane extension implemented to prevent blockage.

feedback.review: Buses can now stop without blocking the entire road. Good technical solution.

details: Damaged swing set repaired and safety bolts replaced. New wooden planks installed on the park footbridge and sealed.

feedback.review: The playground is safe again. Thank you for making these essential repairs.

details: Major electrical fault traced and isolated. Street lamp wiring replaced and multiple burnt-out bulbs changed.

feedback.review: The whole neighborhood is lit again. Very quick and professional repair.

details: Graffiti removed from the underpass walls and anti-graffiti sealant applied. Vandalized benches repaired and repainted.

feedback.review: The underpass looks clean and safe now. Good job with the restoration.

details: Major drainage infrastructure overhaul. Installation of high-capacity pump station and replacement of main storm sewer trunk line to prevent seasonal flooding.

feedback.review: The biggest problem in our area is finally solved. No flooding this year! Multi-month work paid off.
High cost, but the quality of the new drainage system is fantastic. Worth the public money.

details: Emergency crew dispatched to remove large, hazardous tree branch threatening power lines. Full tree inspection completed for future maintenance.

feedback.review: Fast and safe removal. Avoided a power outage.

details: Thermoplastic repainting of all faded crosswalks at the intersection. New pedestrian warning signs installed.

feedback.review: Markings are vibrant and clear, making crossing much safer at night.

details: Installation of new rubberized safety surfacing on the playground. Damaged play equipment replaced with a new climbing structure.

feedback.review: The playground is now modern and much safer for all the children. Great long-term investment.

details: Damaged main electrical feeder cable for the public lighting network repaired and insulated. Street lamps reactivated.

feedback.review: Power restored quickly after the outage. Excellent reliability.

details: Illegal dumping site cleared and disinfected. Warning signs posted and surveillance increased to deter repeat offenses.

feedback.review: The lot is clean now, and the surveillance is a great initiative.

details: Comprehensive road pavement and sidewalk upgrade project (1.2 km section). Includes new curbs, drainage inlets, and asphalt overlay.

feedback.review: The road is fantastic. The biggest improvement we've seen in years.
The new drainage is excellent, no standing water during the rainy season now.
A huge, successful project. The detour was worth the long-term result.

details: Traffic light timing adjusted for synchronization with the new PWI road section, improving overall traffic flow.

feedback.review: Traffic flow is much smoother since the road opened. Good timing alignment.

details: Damaged concrete benches replaced with anti-vandalism composite material benches. New ornamental plants added to the area.

feedback.review: The park looks clean and well-maintained. The new benches are very durable.

details: Permanent Municipal Law Enforcement presence established in the area to prevent illegal vending and loitering. Ongoing patrol schedule set.
